vocab.meaning: nghiêng về phía, có xu hướng ưu tiên cái gì hơn
vocab.example: I tend to lean towards traditional art as I find the level of detail in oil paintings truly mesmerizing.

vocab.meaning: tìm hiểu qua loa hoặc xem thử một chút cái gì đó
vocab.example: I occasionally dip into modern art galleries to see how contemporary artists are pushing the boundaries.

vocab.meaning: lấy cảm hứng từ, rút ra từ
vocab.example: Many modern artists draw from traditional techniques while adding their own avant-garde twist.

vocab.meaning: làm nổi bật lên (cảm xúc hoặc đặc điểm)
vocab.example: Traditional landscapes often bring out a sense of nostalgia that abstract art sometimes fails to capture.

vocab.meaning: nhìn lại (về quá khứ, lịch sử)
vocab.example: When we look back on the Renaissance era, we can see the pinnacle of realism in traditional art.

vocab.meaning: nổi bật, khác biệt hoàn toàn
vocab.example: Modern installations often stand out in a museum because they use unconventional materials like light and sound.

vocab.meaning: nghiên cứu kỹ, đào sâu tìm hiểu
vocab.example: I’ve started to dig into the meaning behind abstract expressionism to better appreciate modern art.

vocab.meaning: dần dần khiến ai đó thấy thích (ban đầu có thể không thích)
vocab.example: Modern art didn't appeal to me at first, but it has really grown on me over the years.
Traditional art forms are precious because they have been passed down through generations, preserving our heritage.

vocab.meaning: tóm gọn, khái quát lại bản chất
vocab.example: To sum up, I enjoy both styles as they each reflect the societal values of their respective times.
